title: Upgraded Netherite : Items
description: Adds some items like apples and totems to the Upgraded Netherite mod.
body:
Please use the Modrinth download and do not rehost the files. This mod may be used in any modpacks. (On Modrinth) No plan for fabric version at this time, sorry.

DESCRIPTION


Adds Upgraded Netherite Items.

CRAFTS


Show Crafts
1.19

ITEMS


Netherite Apple : Hunger II. (00:45), Slowness I. (00:20), Fire Resistance. (01:00), Netherite Strength I. (00:45), Netherite Resistance I. (00:20). Enchanted Netherite Apple : Hunger IV. (03:00), Slowness II. (01:20), Fire Resistance. (05:00), Netherite Strength II. (03:00), Netherite Resistance II. (01:20).

Golderite Apple : Hunger II. (00:45), Slowness I. (00:20), Fire Resistance. (01:00), Netherite Strength I. (00:45), Netherite Resistance I. (00:20), Netherite Luck I. Enchanted Golderite Apple : Hunger IV. (03:00), Slowness II. (01:20), Fire Resistance. (05:00), Netherite Strength II. (03:00), Netherite Resistance II. (01:20), Netherite Luck II.

Enderite Pearl : Select a Living Entity and throw the pearl to teleport it.

(When activated) Netherite&Upgraded Totem : Regeneration II. (00:45), Absorption II. (00:05), Fire Resistance. (00:40), Netherite Strength I. (00:20), Netherite Resistance II. (00:20)

Golderite Totem : 10% Damage Resistance against Piglins. Blazerite Totem : 10% Damage Resistance against Fire Enemies. Enderite Totem : 10% Damage Resistance against Ender Enemies & Can save from the Void. Prismarite Totem : 10% Damage Resistance against Aquatic Enemies. Witherite Totem : 10% Damage Resistance against Wither Skeleton. Spiderite Totem : 10% Damage Resistance against Arthropods. Phanterite Totem : 10% Damage Resistance against Phantoms. Featherite Totem : 10% Damage Resistance against Baby Enemies. Corrupterite Totem : Increase Damage Resistance by 5% for every Corrupterite Armor equipped.

CONFIGURATION


Client upgradednetherite_items-client.toml is located in /config. Server upgradednetherite_items-server.toml is located in /saves/WORLD_NAME/serverconfigs. By copying this file to your /defaultconfigs folder, you can apply these configurations to all newly created worlds. Dedicated servers have this file in /world/serverconfigs

Upgraded Netherite
Adds upgraded versions of Netherite with helpful effects.
Upgraded Netherite : Ultimerite
Adds Ultimerite Tier to the Upgraded Netherite mod.
Upgraded Tools
Add hammers that act as swords, axes, picks, shovels and hoes combined.
